title: Need a Dvd Rip from Evangelion Death And Rebirth Help
display_title: Need a Dvd Rip from Evangelion Death And Rebirth Help
wikitext:
[]: Need a Dvd Rip from Evangelion Death And Rebirth, Help! Post by Asuka 02 » Sun Feb 27, 2011 10:15 am Im looking for a Dvd Rip from the Movie Death And Rebirth with a very good resolution In Japanese with English Subtitles. Please Help Me i can`t find a good download.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 27, 2011 10:37 am Sorry, but this is against our rules: http://wiki.evageeks.org/EvaGeeks_Forum_Rules_and_Guidelines#Other Perhaps you could buy the official English release? http://cgi.ebay.com/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Death-and-Rebirth-DVD-US-Rel-/400197457484 Alternatively, if you know how to create your own subtitles, you could import the Japanese DTS edition. I have it, and it has considerably better quality than the official English release. http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KIBA-1209
